steps.name: And user logs in as "siteadmin" with password "admin_password"
When user navigates to "Channels" section of Explore
When user "searches" the entity "channel for filter and sorting" from Explore "Channels" using Filter "All"
When the user selects the "link" to click on the channel "channel for filter and sorting"
